words.chinese: 对某件事达成共识、理解一致
words.scene: 开会、合作讨论时确认双方理解相同
words.example: Before we move forward, I want to make sure we're all on the same page about the timeline.

words.chinese: 表达一个观点；特意做某件事
words.scene: 讨论中强调某事，或刻意做某事
words.example: She made a point of thanking everyone individually after the meeting.

words.scene: 口语，称赞某人或自我评价
words.example: You nailed that presentation — the client loved it.

words.scene: 正式场合，比 try 更有分量
words.example: We must endeavor to close that gap.

words.scene: 口语，表示做成了一件不容易的事
words.example: I can't believe they pulled off such a complex launch in just two weeks.

words.scene: 科技/商业场合，描述新想法或新方法
words.example: Companies that fail to innovate risk being left behind.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 科研、科技领域重大进展
words.example: This discovery represents a major breakthrough in cancer research.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: She filed a patent for her new invention last month.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: They devised a clever plan to solve the problem.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: It takes time to acquire fluency in a new language.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述某人在某领域的深度能力
words.example: Her expertise in machine learning is widely recognized.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: We need to review our financial projections for Q3.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: The project was funded by a government grant.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 讨论产品或项目的商业化
words.example: The film was a commercial success despite mixed reviews.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 决定使用某种方式/技术
words.example: Many companies have adopted remote work as a permanent policy.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 讨论某事物所体现的本质，或自我反思
words.example: Take a moment to reflect on what you've learned.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 对问题、情况或人作出反应
words.example: She responded calmly to the unexpected question.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 团队、利益或想法之间的碰撞
words.example: There was a conflict of interest in his decision.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: This is a significant step forward for the team.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 把想法或计划付诸行动
words.example: We plan to implement the new system next quarter.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: The two teams collaborated to deliver the project on time.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 对结果、方案进行系统性判断
words.example: We need to evaluate the risks before proceeding.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 用例子或实验证明某观点
words.example: The data demonstrates a clear upward trend.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 主动做事，或某个新计划/倡议
words.example: She took the initiative and solved the problem before anyone asked.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 讨论问题时强调从某个角度看
words.example: Looking at it from a different perspective changes everything.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 方法论、结构化思维、系统设计
words.example: We need a clear framework before we start building.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 技术/科学讨论中的边界条件
words.example: Set the parameters carefully before running the model.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: The algorithm processes millions of data points per second.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: We're working to optimize the app's loading speed.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述系统或方案能随规模增长
words.example: The architecture is designed to be scalable from day one.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: The team deployed the update at midnight to minimize disruption.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: We iterate quickly — ship, learn, improve.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 评估性能或与标准对比
words.example: This model sets a new benchmark for performance.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 从数据或经验中得出的深层认识
words.example: The user interviews gave us valuable insights into their pain points.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 充分利用现有条件来达成目标
words.example: We can leverage our existing network to grow faster.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: There's been a substantial improvement in the results.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 面对困难或对某观点提出异议
words.example: The biggest challenge is keeping the team aligned.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述资源、时间或条件的限制
words.example: Budget constraints forced us to prioritize ruthlessly.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: You need to prioritize the tasks that move the needle.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: The new process streamlines onboarding from two weeks to three days.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: Being transparent with your team builds trust.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 环境、商业模式的长期可行性
words.example: We need a sustainable model, not just short-term growth.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.chinese: 有韧性的，能快速恢复的
words.scene: 描述人或系统抗压能力
words.example: A resilient team bounces back quickly from setbacks.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述事物发展的推进力
words.example: We have real momentum right now — don't slow down.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.chinese: 催化剂；推动变化的人/事
words.example: The pandemic was a catalyst for digital transformation.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述表达或计划的逻辑清晰
words.example: Make sure your argument is coherent before presenting it.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述不清晰或可多种解读的情况
words.example: The instructions were ambiguous, so people interpreted them differently.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.example: Keep your emails concise — no one reads long messages.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 覆盖所有方面的分析或方案
words.example: She gave a comprehensive overview of the project status.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述变化中的环境或有活力的人
words.example: The market is too dynamic to rely on last year's strategy.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 提前行动而不是被动响应
words.example: Being proactive means solving problems before they arise.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 评估信息来源或论点的可靠性
words.example: You need credible evidence to support your claim.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 描述细微的差别或隐含的含义
words.example: There's a subtle difference between confidence and arrogance.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 要求对方展开解释，或描述精心制作的东西
words.example: Could you elaborate on what you mean by that?
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.scene: 正式承认某事实，或确认信息已收到
words.example: He acknowledged the mistake and explained how he'd fix it.
words.source: 雅思词库 + 真实场景

words.chinese: n. 大气层，大气圈；气氛
words.example: Understanding atmosphere is essential in academic and professional contexts.
